title: LEGO Fortnite Mecha Team Leader Figure - Display Model Kit incl. a Sword & a Minifigure - Collectible Gift for Adult Video Gaming Fans - 77078
features: LEGO Fortnite figure for gaming fans – Create a collectible gaming figure with this LEGO Fortnite Mecha Team Leader building set for adults
Display model kit – Packed with details to thrill fans, the video game mech figure can be posed in different directions at the hips, arms, feet and head and comes with a sword accessory
Collectible minifigure – Also included is a LEGO minifigure based on the same character that can be placed in the cockpit in the robot figure’s chest
Digital bonus – This collectible LEGO set for adults includes digital bonus items: Mecha Team Leader and Mecha Team Shadow Outfits, redeemable in the LEGO Fortnite and Fortnite games
Gift idea for gamers – This LEGO Fortnite set makes a fun piece of desk decor, and a great gift for men and women who love gaming, LEGO Fortnite and collectible model kits
LEGO Builder app – This set is available in the LEGO Builder app, where builders can zoom in and rotate models in 3D and track and save their progress
Discover LEGO Fortnite – Unlock new levels of creativity with our collection of LEGO Fortnite sets (sold separately) and bring the gaming adventure into the real world
description: From the manufacturer The Mecha Team Leader awaits Get ready to build a gaming icon Take your passion for gaming off-screen with this awesome LEGO Fortnite Mecha Team Leader building set for adults. Loaded with exciting details, it’s a thrilling project for gamers and LEGO Fortnite fans. Bring a gaming figure to life Get acquainted with this LEGO Fortnite hero The Mecha Team Leader build is based on the iconic robot character that saved the Fortnite Battle Royale Chapter 1 Island and features posable hips, arms, feet and head, plus a cool Sword of Singularity accessory. Previous page A video game icon Fans will be thrilled to build the large Mecha Team Leader figure before discovering the exclusive Mecha Team Leader minifigure. Place the minifigure in the cockpit Once you’ve finished building the Mecha Team Leader, place the minifigure in the driving seat of its chest cockpit. Thrill the gamers in your life This building set makes an awesome gift for men, women and LEGO Fortnite fans, who will unlock their creativity while assembling this stunning robot figure. Enjoy digital building instructions Gamers can zoom, rotate and track their progress using the LEGO Builder app, which provides an immersive building experience. Next page An impressive display Video game decor Once you’ve completed this cool project, display your collectable Mecha Team Leader figure proudly as video game decor that’s sure to impress guests. Previous page LEGO Fortnite Durrr Burger Restaurant A 546-piece, 10-plus set (sold separately) featuring a Durrr Burger model and 4 LEGO Fortnite minifigures. LEGO Fortnite Klombo A 1,084-piece, 10-plus set (sold separately) featuring a Klombo model and 2 LEGO Fortnite minifigures. Next page
